title: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CARE - 211info
text: GEORGE FOX BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CENTER BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health assessments and individual, family, and group therapy. Therapy is offered to those with chronic and acute issues, as long as there is a specific therapy goal. The clinic is not qualified to provide sex offender treatment or perform custody evaluations. Therapists are current students in the George Fox Doctor of Psychology program. Many are Master's-level trained. A licensed psychologist supervises all therapists. 515 N Villa Road Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Underserved and low-income households, age 4 and older. For individuals under age 18, parental consent is required. Hours: Monday-Tuesday 8am-5pm Email (503) 389-0565 - Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 389-0565 Reception New Patient Line Appointment Line - Call or Text (503) 554-2368 Alternate Established Patient Line Reception (503) 389-0565 New Patient Line Appointment Line - Call or Text Tammy Odoherty Alternate (503) 554-2368 Established Patient Line Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, or email for more information FEES: None for the intake appointment. Therapy appointments are $30 per appointment. Comprehensive psychological assessments are $650. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Marion, Polk, Washington, and Yamhill Counties Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Guidance Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GEORGE FOX BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CENTER
